---
title: "Trade and Transport"
subtitle: "Geography of trade routes, transportation networks, and global connectivity."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---


Welcome to the **Trade and Transport** module of Geography OpenCourseWare. This course examines the spatial patterns of trade and the transportation systems that connect producers to consumers across local, national, and global scales.

---

## UGC NET Syllabus

* **Theories and Models of spatial interaction (Edward Ullman and M. E. Hurst).**
* **Measures and Indices of connectivity and accessibility.**
* **Spatial Flow Models: Gravity Model and its variants.**
* **World Trade Organisation, Globalisation and Liberalisation and World Trade Patterns.**
* **Problems and Prospects of Inter and Intra Regional Cooperation and Trade.**

---

{{< include trade-and-transport/models-of-transportation-and-transport-cost.md >}}

{{< include trade-and-transport/accessibility-and-connectivity.md >}}

{{< include trade-and-transport/inter-regional-and-intra-regional-trade.md >}}

{{< include trade-and-transport/comparative-cost-advantages.md >}}
